— Contact · Structure Me

Begin a conversation.

We work with a small number of founders, private boards and family offices at any one time. The conversations that lead somewhere usually start the same way — a few sentences on what you're building, where you've got to, and what you'd like to be true about it in five years. Tell us the shape of it below and we'll respond personally.

  • Headquarters Melbourne, Australia
  • Email tarek@structureme.com.au
  • Direct mobile to our principal 0477 363 612
— Enquiry

Tell us what you're working on.

The more concrete the situation, the more useful the first reply. Headline numbers, ownership, where you'd like to be in three to five years — anything that helps us understand the brief.

Contact form

Or write directly to tarek@structureme.com.au
